title: plectranthus epilithicus
intro: Plectranthus epilithicus, a type of succulent plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Plectranthus epilithicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
